scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && cargo watch -w core/src -w server/src -w core/Cargo.toml -w server/Cargo.toml -w Cargo.toml -x 'run -p simhammer-server'
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run kill && cd desktop && npm run dev
scripts.desktop:dev:source: npm run kill && cd desktop && node scripts/dev.js --build-simc
